name: print2paper4vscode
description: Print selections or current tabs with syntax highlighting and interactive PDF preview

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Print2Paper
walkthroughs.description: Print or save any code file as a syntax-highlighted PDF. Live preview, 100+ themes, every page size you would actually use.

steps.title: Try it now
steps.description: Open any text file and press **Alt+P**, or [run the Print2Paper command](command:{{extId}}.{{cmdPrint}}). A live preview panel opens beside your editor; this hero image shows the zoom dropdown.

media.altText: Print2Paper preview panel showing the zoom dropdown with 50%-300%, Fit Width, and Fit Page options

steps.title: Print menu
steps.description: Save the rendered PDF to disk, send it directly to your default printer, or open the system print dialog for full driver control.

media.altText: Print menu: Save as PDF, Print, Print Sample

steps.title: Page menu
steps.description: Pick a page size (Letter, A4, Legal, Tabloid, Ledger, A3, Executive) and orientation (portrait or landscape).

media.altText: Page menu: page sizes and orientation

steps.title: Theme menu
steps.description: Choose any of the 100+ bundled Shiki themes. Defaults to your active VS Code theme.

media.altText: Theme menu: Shiki theme picker dropdown

steps.title: Text menu
steps.description: Set the font size, anywhere from 8 px to 24 px.

media.altText: Text menu: font size from 8 px to 24 px

steps.title: Markdown mode
steps.description: Open a `.md` file to see this menu. Toggle between syntax-highlighted markdown source and a fully rendered HTML preview.

media.altText: Markdown mode menu: raw vs render toggle

steps.title: About
steps.description: Version info, links to the marketplace listing, and the keyboard shortcut for the Print2Paper command.

scripts.compile:deploy: npm run precompile && npm run clean && tsc -p ./config/
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run esbuild
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:yaml
scripts.test:gherkin: node scripts/setup-vscode-mock.js && node --import @cucumber/node/bootstrap --import tsx --test features/coords-debug.feature features/coords-pagelayout.feature features/coords.feature features/diagnostics.feature features/os-coverage.feature features/os-coverage2.feature features/os-platform.feature features/paperprinter-coverage.feature features/paperprinter-coverage2.feature features/paperprinter.feature features/pdf-coverage.feature features/pdf-coverage2.feature features/pdf.feature features/registry-coverage.feature features/registry.feature features/smoke.feature features/stylize-coverage.feature features/stylize-coverage2.feature features/stylize.feature features/tabinspector.feature features/ui-coverage.feature features/ui.feature features/uimenumgr-coverage.feature features/uimenumgr-coverage2.feature features/uimenumgr.feature features/uiwebview.feature features/utils-coverage.feature features/vscodeapis.feature features/yaml.feature
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:gherkin
